sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data XML NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM xml_data WHERE xslt ('my_stylesheet.xsl', xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(data))) IS NOT NULL OR id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM xml_data);
SELECT id, xml_data.data, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY xslt('my_stylesheet.xsl', xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(data)))) AS count FROM xml_data GROUP BY id, data HAVING count > 0 OR data LIKE '%Value%';
CREATE TABLE temp_data (value VARCHAR, num_value INT);
INSERT INTO temp_data (value, num_value) VALUES (NULL, 10), ('', 20), ('Some Text', NULL);
SELECT xslt('my_stylesheet.xsl', xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(data))) OR (SELECT MAX(num_value) FROM temp_data WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL) FROM xml_data;
SELECT id, xslt('my_stylesheet.xsl', xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(data))) AS xslt_out FROM xml_data WHERE xslt_out IS NOT NULL OR id < 0;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_result AS SELECT id, data FROM xml_data WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM temp_data WHERE temp_data.value = 'Some Text' OR temp_data.value IS NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_data WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL OR (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_data WHERE xslt('my_stylesheet.xsl', xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(data))) IS NULL);
